headline: Jim Cramer on Quanta Services: “It’s Been Worth Owning”
summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted, as he discussed the massive AI infrastructure buildout. headline: 1 Mooning  Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Ignore
summary: Each stock in this article is trading near its 52-week high. These elevated prices usually indicate some degree of investor confidence, business improvements, or favorable market conditions.
